ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather data entry */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Precise timestamp for each data entry */,
  "mean_temp" REAL /* Average temperature recorded */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Average humidity recorded */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Average wind speed recorded */,
  "mean_pressure" REAL /* Mean atmospheric pressure recorded */,
  "cloud_cover" REAL /* Percentage of cloud cover */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Amount of precipitation */,
  "visibility" REAL /* Visibility in meters or miles */,
  "air_quality_index" INTEGER /* Air quality index */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location where the data was collected */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location where the data was collected */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the location where the data was collected */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference ID for the weather station where data was collected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the weather station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the station */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the station */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the station was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance performed on the station */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current operational status of the station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the user account is active */,
  "failed_login_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of consecutive failed login attempts */,
  "lockout_time" TEXT /* Time until the account is unlocked after multiple failed login attempts */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data entry being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the data */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the data access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather station associated with the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., temperature, wind speed) */,
  "alert_severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "threshold_value" REAL /* Threshold value that triggered the alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was generated */,
  "alert_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the alert */,
  "resolved_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was resolved */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who resolved the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_resolved_by FOREIGN KEY ("resolved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source (e.g., weather API, local sensor) */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the data source (e.g., manual, automated) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL or endpoint of the data source */,
  "last_sync_date" TEXT /* Date of the last data synchronization */,
  "sync_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data synchronization (e.g., hourly, daily) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality_assurance" (
  "check_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality check */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data entry being checked */,
  "quality_check_date" TEXT /* Date when the quality check was performed */,
  "check_result" TEXT /* Result of the quality check (e.g., pass, fail) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments regarding the quality check */,
  "qa_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the quality check */,
  "qa_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the quality check process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("check_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_assurance_qa_by FOREIGN KEY ("qa_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_assurance_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was created */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the dataset (e.g., CSV, JSON, XML) */,
  "data_size" TEXT /* Size of the dataset in bytes */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* ID of the alert that triggered the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., sent, read) */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., email, SMS, push notification) */,
  "delivery_status" TEXT /* Status of the notification delivery (e.g., sent, delivered, failed) */,
  "delivery_time" TEXT /* Time when the notification was delivered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_alert_id FOREIGN KEY ("alert_id") REFERENCES alerts ("alert_id")
)
